mapper.select: SELECT RESUME_SN FROM TN_RESUME WHERE USER_SN = #{userSn} ORDER BY RESUME_SN LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(RESUME_SN), 0) + 1 FROM TN_RESUME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TN_RESUME (RESUME_SN, USER_SN, RESUME_SJ, REGISTER) VALUES (#{resumeSn}, #{userSn}, '기본 이력서', #{reg})
mapper.select: SELECT career_level_sel FROM sys_user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userSn}
SELECT t.name FROM sys_user_type ut JOIN sys_common_type t ON t.common_id = ut.type_id WHERE ut.user_id = #{userSn} AND t.group_code = 'JOB_PREFERENCE' ORDER BY t.common_id
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(ACDMCR_SN), 0) + 1 FROM TN_RESUME_ACDMCR
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TN_RESUME_ACDMCR (ACDMCR_SN, RESUME_SN, SCHUL_NM, ACDMCR_BEGIN_DE, ACDMCR_END_DE, ACDMCR_SE_CODE, MAJOR_NM, PNT, TOTALPNT, THESIS_CN, REGISTER, UPDUSR) VALUES (#{d.acdmcrSn}, #{resumeSn}, #{d.schoolName}, #{d.entranceYm}, #{d.graduationYm}, #{seCode}, #{d.majorName}, #{d.gpa}, #{d.totalGpa}, #{d.thesis}, #{reg}, #{reg})
mapper.update: UPDATE TN_RESUME_ACDMCR SET SCHUL_NM = #{d.schoolName}, ACDMCR_BEGIN_DE = #{d.entranceYm}, ACDMCR_END_DE = #{d.graduationYm}, ACDMCR_SE_CODE = #{seCode}, MAJOR_NM = #{d.majorName}, PNT = #{d.gpa}, TOTALPNT = #{d.totalGpa}, THESIS_CN = #{d.thesis}, UPDUSR = #{reg}, UPDDE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ACDMCR_SN = #{d.acdmcrSn}
mapper.select: SELECT a.ACDMCR_SN AS acdmcrSn, a.ACDMCR_SE_CODE AS seLabel, a.SCHUL_NM AS schoolName, a.ACDMCR_BEGIN_DE AS entranceYm, a.ACDMCR_END_DE AS graduationYm, e.graduation_status AS gradStatusLabel, a.MAJOR_NM AS majorName, a.PNT AS gpa, a.TOTALPNT AS totalGpa, e.minor_major AS minorMajor, a.THESIS_CN AS thesis, COALESCE(e.is_final, 0) AS isFinal FROM TN_RESUME_ACDMCR a LEFT JOIN sys_education e ON e.acdmcr_sn = a.ACDMCR_SN WHERE a.RESUME_SN = #{resumeSn} ORDER BY a.ACDMCR_SN
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_education (acdmcr_sn, minor_major, graduation_status, is_final) VALUES (#{acdmcrSn}, #{minorMajor}, #{gradCode}, #{isFinal}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE minor_major = VALUES(minor_major), graduation_status = VALUES(graduation_status), is_final = VALUES(is_final)
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAREER_SN), 0) + 1 FROM TN_RESUME_CAREER
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TN_RESUME_CAREER (CAREER_SN, RESUME_SN, CAREER_INSTT_NM, DEPT_NM, CLSF_NM, DTY_NM, ANSLRY_AM, CAREER_CN, CAREER_BEGIN_DE, CAREER_END_DE, REGISTER, UPDUSR) VALUES (#{d.careerSn}, #{resumeSn}, #{d.companyName}, #{d.deptName}, #{d.position}, #{d.jobField}, #{salary}, #{d.jobDescription}, #{d.startYm}, #{d.endYm}, #{reg}, #{reg})
mapper.update: UPDATE TN_RESUME_CAREER SET CAREER_INSTT_NM = #{d.companyName}, DEPT_NM = #{d.deptName}, CLSF_NM = #{d.position}, DTY_NM = #{d.jobField}, ANSLRY_AM = #{salary}, CAREER_CN = #{d.jobDescription}, CAREER_BEGIN_DE = #{d.startYm}, CAREER_END_DE = #{d.endYm}, UPDUSR = #{reg}, UPDDE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE CAREER_SN = #{d.careerSn}
mapper.select: SELECT CAREER_SN AS careerSn, CAREER_INSTT_NM AS companyName, DEPT_NM AS deptName, CLSF_NM AS position, DTY_NM AS jobField, ANSLRY_AM AS salary, CAREER_CN AS jobDescription, CAREER_BEGIN_DE AS startYm, CAREER_END_DE AS endYm FROM TN_RESUME_CAREER WHERE RESUME_SN = #{resumeSn} ORDER BY CAREER_SN
SELECT user_id FROM sys_user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userSn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_profile (user_id, persona_code, career_level_code) VALUES (#{userSn}, 1, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT research_id AS researchId, content FROM sys_user_research WHERE user_id = #{userSn} ORDER BY research_id
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(ACT_SN),0)+1 FROM TN_RESUME_ACT

SELECT ACT_SN AS actSn, ACT_SE_CODE AS kind, ACT_INSTT_NM AS org, DATE_FORMAT(ACT_BEGIN_DE,'%Y.%m') AS `start`, DATE_FORMAT(ACT_END_DE,'%Y.%m') AS `end`, ACT_CN AS `desc` FROM TN_RESUME_ACT WHERE RESUME_SN = #{resumeSn} ORDER BY ACT_SN
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TN_RESUME_ACT (ACT_SN, RESUME_SN, ACT_SE_CODE, ACT_INSTT_NM, ACT_BEGIN_DE, ACT_END_DE, ACT_CN, REGISTER, UPDUSR) VALUES (#{actSn}, #{resumeSn}, #{seCode}, #{d.org}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{d.desc}, #{reg}, #{reg})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(EDC_SN),0)+1 FROM TN_RESUME_EDC

SELECT EDC_SN AS edcSn, EDC_NM AS name, EDC_INSTT_NM AS org, DATE_FORMAT(EDC_BEGIN_DE,'%Y.%m') AS `start`, DATE_FORMAT(EDC_END_DE,'%Y.%m') AS `end`, EDC_CN AS `desc` FROM TN_RESUME_EDC WHERE RESUME_SN = #{resumeSn} ORDER BY EDC_SN
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TN_RESUME_EDC (EDC_SN, RESUME_SN, EDC_NM, EDC_BEGIN_DE, EDC_END_DE, EDC_INSTT_NM, EDC_CN, REGISTER, UPDUSR) VALUES (#{edcSn}, #{resumeSn}, #{d.name}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{d.org}, #{d.desc}, #{reg}, #{reg})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CRQFC_SN),0)+1 FROM TN_RESUME_CRQFC
SELECT CRQFC_SN AS crqfcSn, CRQFC_NM AS name, PBLICTE_INSTT_NM AS issuer, DATE_FORMAT(ACQS_DE,'%Y.%m.%d') AS got FROM TN_RESUME_CRQFC WHERE RESUME_SN = #{resumeSn} ORDER BY CRQFC_SN
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TN_RESUME_CRQFC (CRQFC_SN, RESUME_SN, CRQFC_NM, ACQS_DE, PBLICTE_INSTT_NM, REGISTER, UPDUSR) VALUES (#{crqfcSn}, #{resumeSn}, #{d.name}, #{acqsDate}, #{d.issuer}, #{reg}, #{reg})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(WNPZ_SN),0)+1 FROM TN_RESUME_WNPZ
SELECT WNPZ_SN AS wnpzSn, WNPZ_NM AS name, WNPZ_INSTT_NM AS org, WNPZ_YEAR AS `year`, WNPZ_CN AS `desc` FROM TN_RESUME_WNPZ WHERE RESUME_SN = #{resumeSn} ORDER BY WNPZ_SN
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TN_RESUME_WNPZ (WNPZ_SN, RESUME_SN, WNPZ_NM, WNPZ_INSTT_NM, WNPZ_YEAR, WNPZ_CN, REGISTER, UPDUSR) VALUES (#{wnpzSn}, #{resumeSn}, #{d.name}, #{d.org}, #{d.year}, #{d.desc}, #{reg}, #{reg})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(OVSEA_SN),0)+1 FROM TN_RESUME_OVSEA
SELECT OVSEA_SN AS ovseaSn, OVSEA_NM AS country, OVSEA_BEGIN_DE AS `start`, OVSEA_END_DE AS `end`, OVSEA_CN AS `desc` FROM TN_RESUME_OVSEA WHERE RESUME_SN = #{resumeSn} ORDER BY OVSEA_SN
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TN_RESUME_OVSEA (OVSEA_SN, RESUME_SN, OVSEA_NM, OVSEA_BEGIN_DE, OVSEA_END_DE, OVSEA_CN, REGISTER, UPDUSR) VALUES (#{ovseaSn}, #{resumeSn}, #{d.country}, #{d.start}, #{d.end}, #{d.desc}, #{reg}, #{reg})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LSTCS_SN),0)+1 FROM TN_RESUME_LSTCS
SELECT LSTCS_SN AS lstcsSn, LSTCS_NM AS lang, LSTCS_ABLTY_CODE AS speak, LSTCS_KIND AS testName, LSTCS_POINT AS testScore FROM TN_RESUME_LSTCS WHERE RESUME_SN = #{resumeSn} ORDER BY LSTCS_SN
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TN_RESUME_LSTCS (LSTCS_SN, RESUME_SN, LSTCS_CODE, LSTCS_NM, LSTCS_ABLTY_CODE, LSTCS_KIND, LSTCS_POINT, REGISTER, UPDUSR) VALUES (#{lstcsSn}, #{resumeSn}, '00', #{langName}, #{ablty}, #{d.testName}, #{d.testScore}, #{reg}, #{reg})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(PRTFOLIO_URL_SN),0)+1 FROM TN_RESUME_PRTFOLIO_URL
SELECT PRTFOLIO_URL_SN AS sn, PRTFOLIO_URL AS url FROM TN_RESUME_PRTFOLIO_URL WHERE RESUME_SN = #{resumeSn} ORDER BY PRTFOLIO_URL_SN
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TN_RESUME_PRTFOLIO_URL (PRTFOLIO_URL_SN, RESUME_SN, PRTFOLIO_URL, REGISTER, UPDUSR) VALUES (#{sn}, #{resumeSn}, #{url}, #{reg}, #{reg})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TN_RESUME_PRTFOLIO_URL WHERE PRTFOLIO_URL_SN = #{sn} AND RESUME_SN = #{resumeSn}
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_SN AS fileSn, ORGINL_FILE_NM AS name, FILE_SIZE AS size, STRE_FILE_NM AS streName, FILE_PATH AS path FROM TN_ATCH_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND FILE_PATH = #{path} ORDER BY FILE_SN
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TN_ATCH_FILE (FILE_ID, FILE_PATH, ORGINL_FILE_NM, STRE_FILE_NM, FILE_SIZE, REGISTER) VALUES (#{fileId}, #{path}, #{orgNm}, #{streNm}, #{size}, #{reg})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TN_ATCH_FILE WHERE FILE_SN = #{fileSn} AND FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND FILE_PATH = #{path}
mapper.select: SELECT SELF_INTRCN_SN AS sn, SELF_INTRCN_SJ AS title, SELF_INTRCN_CN AS content FROM TN_RESUME_SELF_INTRCN WHERE RESUME_SN = #{resumeSn} ORDER BY SELF_INTRCN_SN LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SELF_INTRCN_SN),0)+1 FROM TN_RESUME_SELF_INTRCN
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TN_RESUME_SELF_INTRCN (SELF_INTRCN_SN, RESUME_SN, SELF_INTRCN_SJ, SELF_INTRCN_CN, REGISTER, UPDUSR) VALUES (#{sn}, #{resumeSn}, #{title}, #{content}, #{reg}, #{reg})
mapper.update: UPDATE TN_RESUME_SELF_INTRCN SET SELF_INTRCN_SJ = #{title}, SELF_INTRCN_CN = #{content}, UPDUSR = #{reg} WHERE SELF_INTRCN_SN = #{sn}
